https://youtu.be/TaF3Al5NUqM - –°–ú–ē–°–í–ź–ú–ē –í–°–ė–ß–ö–ė –í–ö–£–°–ě–í–ē –°–ě–ö –í –ē–Ē–Ě–ě –ė –ü–†–ź–í–ė–ú –ď–ė–ď–ź–Ě–Ę–°–ö–ė –ö–ě–ö–Ę–ē–ô–õ!

‚Äě–í –Ĺ–į—á–į–Ľ–ĺ—ā–ĺ –∂–ł–≤–Ķ–Ķ—Ö–ľ–Ķ –≤ –Ķ–ī–Ĺ–ĺ—Ā—ā–į–Ķ–Ĺ –į–Ņ–į—Ä—ā–į–ľ–Ķ–Ĺ—ā —Ā –ĺ—Č–Ķ –Ķ–ī–Ĺ–ĺ —Ā–Ķ–ľ–Ķ–Ļ—Ā—ā–≤–ĺ. –†–ĺ–ī–ł—ā–Ķ–Ľ–ł—ā–Ķ –ľ–ł —Ä–į–Ī–ĺ—ā–Ķ—Ö–į –ľ–Ĺ–ĺ–≥–ĺ –∑–ī—Ä–į–≤–ĺ, –∑–į –ī–į —Ā–Ķ —Ā–Ņ—Ä–į–≤–ł–ľ.
–Ē–ĺ–ļ–į—ā–ĺ –Ņ—Ä–ł—Ź—ā–Ķ–Ľ–ł—ā–Ķ –ľ–ł –ł–ľ–į—Ö–į –ļ—É–Ņ–ł—Č–į —Ā–ļ—ä–Ņ–ł –ī—Ä–Ķ—Ö–ł –Ņ–ĺ—Ā–Ľ–Ķ–ī–Ĺ–į –ľ–ĺ–ī–į, –Ĺ–ł–Ķ –Ņ–į–∑–į—Ä—É–≤–į—Ö–ľ–Ķ –ĺ—ā –ľ–į–≥–į–∑–ł–Ĺ —Ā –Ķ–≤—ā–ł–Ĺ–ł —Ā—ā–ĺ–ļ–ł. –ú–į–ľ–į –≥–ĺ –Ĺ–į—Ä–ł—á–į—ą–Ķ Versace, —Ā–į–ľ–ĺ –∑–į –ī–į –ľ–Ķ –Ĺ–į–ļ–į—Ä–į –ī–į —Ā–Ķ –Ņ–ĺ—á—É—Ā—ā–≤–į–ľ –Ņ–ĺ-–ī–ĺ–Ī—Ä–Ķ. –ē, –≥–ĺ–ī–ł–Ĺ–ł –Ņ–ĺ-–ļ—ä—Ā–Ĺ–ĺ –ĺ—ā–ł–ī–ĺ—Ö –Ĺ–į –ł—Ā—ā–ł–Ĺ—Ā–ļ–ĺ —Ä–Ķ–≤—é –Ĺ–į Versace –ł —Ā–Ķ–ī–Ĺ–į—Ö –Ĺ–į –Ņ—ä—Ä–≤–ł—Ź —Ä–Ķ–ī‚Äú.
–Ę—Ź —Ä–į–∑–ļ–į–∑–≤–į –ļ–į–ļ –ĺ—Č–Ķ –ĺ—ā –ľ–į–Ľ–ļ–į —Ā–≤–ł–ļ–≤–į –ī–į –Ņ—Ä–ł–≥–ĺ—ā–≤—Ź —Ö—Ä–į–Ĺ–į—ā–į —Ā–ł –∑–į —É—á–ł–Ľ–ł—Č–Ķ —Ā–į–ľ–į, –∑–į—Č–ĺ—ā–ĺ –ľ–į–Ļ–ļ–į –Ļ —Ä–į–Ī–ĺ—ā–ł –Ĺ–į –Ĺ—Ź–ļ–ĺ–Ľ–ļ–ĺ –ľ–Ķ—Ā—ā–į –Ķ–ī–Ĺ–ĺ –≤—Ä–Ķ–ľ–Ķ–Ĺ–Ĺ–ĺ, –į –Ī–į—Č–į –Ļ —É—á–ł –ļ–ĺ–ľ–Ņ—é—ā—ä—Ä–Ĺ–ĺ –ł–Ĺ–∂–Ķ–Ĺ–Ķ—Ä—Ā—ā–≤–ĺ.

–ö–ĺ–≥–į—ā–ĺ –Ķ –Ĺ–į 10 –≥–ĺ–ī–ł–Ĺ–ł —ā—Ź –∑–į–Ņ–ĺ—á–≤–į –ī–į —Ā–Ķ –∑–į–Ĺ–ł–ľ–į–≤–į —Ā –≥–ł–ľ–Ĺ–į—Ā—ā–ł–ļ–į –ł –ī–ĺ—Ä–ł –ł–ľ–į —ą–į–Ĺ—Ā –∑–į —Ā–≤–Ķ—ā–ĺ–≤–Ĺ–į –ļ–į—Ä–ł–Ķ—Ä–į. –í—ä–Ņ—Ä–Ķ–ļ–ł —ā–ĺ–≤–į –ĺ–Ī–į—á–Ķ —Ä–Ķ—ą–į–≤–į –ī–į –ł–∑–Ī–Ķ—Ä–Ķ –į–ļ—ā—Ć–ĺ—Ä—Ā–ļ–ĺ—ā–ĺ –ľ–į–Ļ—Ā—ā–ĺ—Ä—Ā—ā–≤–ĺ –ł –∑–į–Ņ–ĺ—á–≤–į –ī–į —Ö–ĺ–ī–ł –Ĺ–į –ļ–į—Ā—ā–ł–Ĺ–≥–ł. –Ě–į –Ņ—ä—ā –∑–į –Ņ—Ä–ĺ—Ā–Ľ—É—ą–≤–į–Ĺ–ł—Ź—ā–į —ā—Ź –≤–∑–ł–ľ–į –ľ–Ķ—ā—Ä–ĺ—ā–ĺ, –į —Ā–Ľ–Ķ–ī —ā–ĺ–≤–į —Ā–ľ–Ķ–Ĺ—Ź –Ņ–ĺ 4 —Ä–į–∑–Ľ–ł—á–Ĺ–ł –į–≤—ā–ĺ–Ī—É—Ā–į. –Ě–Ķ–Ļ–Ĺ–ĺ—ā–ĺ –∂–Ķ–Ľ–į–Ĺ–ł–Ķ –∑–į –ł–∑—Ź–≤–į –Ķ –Ņ–ĺ-–≥–ĺ–Ľ—Ź–ľ–ĺ –ĺ—ā –Ķ–∂–Ķ–ī–Ĺ–Ķ–≤–Ĺ–ł—ā–Ķ –Ņ—Ä–Ķ—á–ļ–ł, –ļ–ĺ–ł—ā–ĺ —Ā—Ä–Ķ—Č–į.

–ó–į–≤—ä—Ä—ą–≤–į –ĺ–Ī—Ä–į–∑–ĺ–≤–į–Ĺ–ł–Ķ—ā–ĺ —Ā–ł –≤ –≥–ł–ľ–Ĺ–į–∑–ł—Ź—ā–į –Ē–∂–Ķ–Ļ –Ď–ł –Ę–į–Ļ—Ä–Ķ–Ľ-—Ā—ā–į—Ä—ą–ł, —Ā–Ľ–Ķ–ī –ļ–ĺ–Ķ—ā–ĺ –Ņ—Ä–ĺ–ī—ä–Ľ–∂–į–≤–į –≤ –£–ł–ļ—Ā—Ą–ĺ—Ä–ī—Ā–ļ–ł –ļ–ĺ–Ľ–Ķ–∂ –∑–į –ł–∑–ļ—É—Ā—ā–≤–į –≤ –°–ļ–į—Ä–Ī—ä—Ä–ĺ. –°–Ľ–Ķ–ī —ā–ĺ–≤–į –∑–į–Ņ–ł—Ā–≤–į ‚Äě–°–ĺ—Ü–ł–ĺ–Ľ–ĺ–≥–ł—Ź‚Äú –≤ —É–Ĺ–ł–≤–Ķ—Ä—Ā–ł—ā–Ķ—ā–į –†–į–Ļ—ä—Ä—Ā—ä–Ĺ –≤ –Ę–ĺ—Ä–ĺ–Ĺ—ā–ĺ, –Ĺ–ĺ –Ņ—Ä–Ķ–ļ—ä—Ā–≤–į –Ņ—Ä–Ķ–∑ 2008 –≥–ĺ–ī–ł–Ĺ–į, –∑–į—Ä–į–ī–ł –į–ļ—ā—Ć–ĺ—Ä—Ā–ļ–į—ā–į –ł –Ņ—Ä–ĺ—Ą–Ķ—Ā–ł—Ź. –ź–ļ—ā—Ć–ĺ—Ä—Ā–ļ–ĺ –ľ–į–Ļ—Ā—ā–ĺ—Ä—Ā—ā–≤–ĺ –Ķ —É—á–ł–Ľ–į –≤ —ą–ļ–ĺ–Ľ–į—ā–į –Ĺ–į –Ē–ł–Ļ–Ĺ –ź—Ä–ľ—Ā—ā—Ä–ĺ–Ĺ–≥, –ļ—ä–ī–Ķ—ā–ĺ –Ķ –∑–į–Ī–Ķ–Ľ—Ź–∑–į–Ĺ–į –ĺ—ā –į–≥–Ķ–Ĺ—Ü–ł–ł—ā–Ķ, —Ā –ļ–ĺ–ł—ā–ĺ –∑–į–Ņ–ĺ—á–≤–į –ī–į —Ä–į–Ī–ĺ—ā–ł.

–ö–į—ā–ĺ —ā–ł–Ļ–Ĺ–Ķ–ī–∂—ä—Ä —ā—Ź –∑–į–Ņ–ĺ—á–≤–į –ī–į —É—á–į—Ā—ā–≤–į –į–≤ —Ä–į–∑–Ľ–ł—á–Ĺ–ł —Ä–Ķ–ļ–Ľ–į–ľ–ł –ł —Ä–į–Ī–ĺ—ā–ł –ļ–į—ā–ĺ –ľ–ĺ–ī–Ķ–Ľ. –ó–į—Ä–į–ī–ł –Ĺ–Ķ–≤–Ķ—Ä–ĺ—Ź—ā–Ĺ–į—ā–į —Ā–ł –ļ—Ä–į—Ā–ĺ—ā–į –ł —á–į—Ä —ā—Ź –Ĺ–Ķ –ĺ—Ā—ā–į–≤–į –Ĺ–Ķ–∑–į–Ī–Ķ–Ľ—Ź–∑–į–Ĺ–į –ĺ—ā –Ņ—Ä–ĺ–ī—É—Ü–Ķ–Ĺ—ā–ł—ā–Ķ –ł –į–≥–Ķ–Ĺ—ā–ł—ā–Ķ –ł —Ā—ā–į—Ä—ā–ł—Ä–į —Ā–≤–ĺ—Ź—ā–į —ā–Ķ–Ľ–Ķ–≤–ł–∑–ł–ĺ–Ĺ–Ĺ–į –ļ–į—Ä–ł–Ķ—Ä–į –Ņ—Ä–Ķ–∑ 2006 –≥–ĺ–ī–ł–Ĺ–į –≤ –°–Ķ–ľ–Ķ–Ķ–Ĺ –Ė–ł–≤–ĺ—ā, –į —Ā–Ľ–Ķ–ī —ā–ĺ–≤–į –Ņ—Ä–į–≤–ł –Ņ—ä—Ä–≤–ł—Ź—ā —Ā–ł –≥–ĺ–Ľ—Ź–ľ –Ņ—Ä–ĺ–Ī–ł–≤ –≤ —Ā–Ķ—Ä–ł–į–Ľ–į ‚Äú–Ē–Ķ–≥—Ä–į—Ā–ł: –°–Ľ–Ķ–ī–≤–į—Č–ĺ –ü–ĺ–ļ–ĺ–Ľ–Ķ–Ĺ–ł–Ķ‚Äú –ļ–į—ā–ĺ –ł–≥—Ä–į–Ķ —Ä–ĺ–Ľ—Ź—ā–į –Ĺ–į –ú–ł–į –∑–į —ā—Ä–ł —Ā–Ķ–∑–ĺ–Ĺ–į. –í —Ā–Ľ–Ķ–ī–≤–į—Č–ł—ā–Ķ –≥–ĺ–ī–ł–Ĺ–ł —Ā–Ķ –Ņ–ĺ—Ź–≤—Ź–≤–į –≤—ä–≤ —Ą–ł–Ľ–ľ–ł –ļ–į—ā–ĺ Fugitive Pieces, Away From Her, The Poet –ł –ī—Ä—É–≥–ł –ļ–į—ā–ĺ –ļ–į—Ä–ł–Ķ—Ä–į –ł –≤ —ā–Ķ–Ľ–Ķ–≤–ł–∑–ł—Ź—ā–į —Ā—ä—Č–ĺ —Ā–Ķ —Ä–į–∑–≤–ł–≤–į —Ā –Ī—ä—Ä–∑–į —Ā–ļ–ĺ—Ä–ĺ—Ā—ā –ł —ā–į–ľ —É—á–į—Ā—ā–≤–į –≤ ‚ÄúThe American Mall‚ÄĚ, Never Cry Werewolf –ł Degrassi Goes Hollywood.

–ü—Ä–Ķ–∑ 2007–≥. —É—á–į—Ā—ā–≤–į –ł –≤ –ľ—É–∑–ł–ļ–į–Ľ–Ĺ–ĺ –≤–ł–ī–Ķ–ĺ –ļ—ä–ľ –Ņ–Ķ—Ā–Ķ–Ĺ—ā–į ‚ÄúYou Got That Light‚ÄĚ –ł–∑–Ņ—ä–Ľ–Ĺ–Ķ–Ĺ–į –ĺ—ā Wade Allain-Marcus –ł David Baum.

snippet.description:
Camdaki KńĪz 4. B√∂l√ľm 

29 Nisan PerŇüembe

Korońülu ailesinin b√ľt√ľn engelleme √ßabalarńĪna rańümen Sedat ve Cana'nńĪn fotońürafńĪ gazetede yayńĪnlanńĪr. Haberin g√ľndeme bomba gibi d√ľŇümesi b√ľt√ľn gazetecileri harekete ge√ßirir. 

Herkes Nalan'ńĪn bu habere vereceńüi tepkiyi merak etmektedir. Yoksa bu b√ľy√ľl√ľ aŇük masalńĪ, daha baŇülamadan bitmiŇü midir? Haberin yayńĪnlanmasńĪyla Korońülu Malik√Ęnesinde kńĪyamet kopar. Ailelerinin Ňüerefi ve Ňüirket hisselerinin geleceńüi i√ßin, bir an √∂nce bu durumu d√ľzeltmeleri ve Nalan'ńĪn y√ľz√ľńü√ľ atmasńĪnńĪ engellemeleri gerekmektedir.

G√ľlseren BudayńĪcńĪońülu‚Äônun aynńĪ isimli romanńĪndan uyarlanan, ger√ßek bir aŇük hikayesinin konu alńĪndńĪńüńĪ Camdaki KńĪz, baŇüarńĪlńĪ oyuncu kadrosuyla da g√∂z dolduruyor. Nalan karakterini Burcu Biricik‚Äôin canlandńĪrdńĪńüńĪ Camdaki KńĪz‚Äôda; Devrim Yakut, Feri Baycu G√ľler, Feyyaz Ňěerifońülu, Hamza YazńĪcńĪ, Hande Ataizi, Merve Polat, Nihal Menzil, Nur S√ľrer, Selma Erge√ß,  Ňěerif Erol, Tamer Levent, Tuńürul T√ľlek yer alńĪyor. Senaryosunu Seda AltaylńĪ Turgutlu‚Äônun kaleme aldńĪńüńĪ, y√∂netmenlińüini ise Nadim G√ľ√ß'√ľn √ľstlendińüi Camdaki KńĪz PerŇüembe 20.00'de Kanal D'de!

------------------

Camdaki KńĪz Trailer is streaming! Adapted from Gulseren Budayicioglu‚Äôs novel of the same name, Camdaki KńĪz is based on a true love story. Kanal D‚Äôs new drama has a phenomenal cast. Burcu Biricik is going to portray the character Nalan, and the other successful actors and actresses of the series are Devrim Yakut, Feri Baycu Guler, Feyyaz Serifoglu, Hamza Yazici, Hande Ataizi, Merve Polat, Nihal Menzil, Nur Surer, Selma Ergec, Serif Erol, Tamer Levent, Tugrul Tulek. Written by Seda Altayli Turgutlu, directed by Nadim Guc, Camdaki Kiz is going to premier on 8 April Thursday at 8 pm on Kanal D!

Oyuncular:  Burcu Biricik, Devrim Yakut, Feyyez Ňěerifońülu, Hamza YazńĪcńĪ, Hande Ataizi, Nur S√ľrer, Selma Erge√ß, Ňěerif Erol, Tamer Levent, Tuńürul T√ľlek bulunuyor

MaraŇülńĪ 15. B√∂l√ľm √Ėzeti:

Polis sirenlerini duyan Necati, kendisini de kasńĪtlńĪ olarak yaralar ve saldńĪrńĪya uńüramńĪŇü gibi davranńĪr. AńüńĪr yaralanan MaraŇülńĪ hastaneye kaldńĪrńĪlńĪr. MaraŇülńĪ, √∂l√ľm ve yaŇüam arasńĪnda savaŇü verecektir.
Mahur ve ailesi g√∂zaltńĪna alńĪnńĪr. T√ľrellerin evi ve Mahur‚Äôun st√ľdyosu polisler tarafńĪndan didik didik aranńĪr. T√ľm T√ľrkiye bu haberle √ßalkalanńĪr. Mahur, Firuzan ve DilŇüat serbest kalńĪrken Aziz ile ńįlhan cezaevine g√∂nderilir. Baba ońüul hapishanede zor zamanlar ge√ßirir. ńįlhan‚Äôa ise pusu kurulur. ńįlhan hayatńĪnńĪ kurtarmayńĪ baŇüarabilecek midir?

Mahur, MaraŇülńĪ‚ÄônńĪn komada olduńüunu √∂ńürenir ve soluńüu hastanede alńĪr. MaraŇülńĪ‚ÄônńĪn baŇüńĪnda beklemeye baŇülar. Necati ve SavaŇü yńĪllardńĪr hayalini kurduklarńĪ babalarńĪna s√ľr√ľlen lekenin intikamńĪnńĪ aldńĪklarńĪnńĪ d√ľŇü√ľn√ľrler. Geriye, istihbarat i√ßin √ßalńĪŇütńĪńüńĪndan emin olduklarńĪ MaraŇülńĪ‚ÄônńĪn √∂l√ľm√ľ kalmńĪŇütńĪr. ńįki kardeŇü MaraŇülńĪ‚ÄônńĪn √∂l√ľm emrini verir. Bu kez Mahur, MaraŇülńĪ‚ÄônńĪn hayatńĪnńĪ kurtarabilecek midir?

snippet.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs. Manchester City: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Manchester City picked up a decisive 2-1 win in the first leg of the UEFA semi final against Paris Saint-Germain. 

PSG came out firing in the first half and converted one of their many chances into a goal. Marquinhos scored in the 15‚Äô to give PSG the lead. PSG kept the pressure on in the first half and finished with 9 shots on goal. 

In the second half PSG was content to sit back and defend the one goal lead. Manchester City took advantage and notched two goals both from set pieces. 
De Bruyne scored in the 64' when he tried to play the ball to the far post off of a free kick and instead found the back of the bet. Then Mahrez put the English side ahead in the 71' when he found the hole in the PSG wall off of a free kick right outside the box. 

Manchester City was able to maintain that one goal lead and will head back home with a huge advantage on aggregate. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on Paramount+:
https://www.paramountplus.com/shows/uefa-champions-league/

#UCL #UEFA #ChampionsLeague #PSG #ManCity #ManchesterCity #ParisSaintGermain

22 Nisan PerŇüembe

Sedat‚ÄôńĪn √∂zel dairesinde g√∂rd√ľklerine bir anlam veremeyen Nalan, yaŇüadńĪklarńĪnńĪ kimseyle paylaŇüamaz. Bir Ňüeylerin ters gittińüini hisseden Feride √ßńĪldńĪrńĪr ve Nalan‚ÄôńĪn √ľzerindeki baskńĪyńĪ artńĪrńĪr. Nalan‚ÄôńĪn, gizli dairesini birine anlatacańüńĪ konusunda endiŇüelenen Sedat, Cana‚Äôyla buluŇüur. Cana, Nalan‚Äôla konuŇüup durumu d√ľzeltmesini tembihler. Ancak bu buluŇümada bir magazincinin √ßektińüi fotońüraflar, Sedat‚Äôa pahalńĪya mal olacaktńĪr.

Sedat, Nalan‚Äôla konuŇüup, √∂zel dairede g√∂rd√ľklerinin kendisine ait olmadńĪńüńĪnńĪ anlatńĪr. Nalan, Sedat‚Äôa yeniden g√ľven duyar, sevdińüi adamla evleneceńüi i√ßin mutludur. YaklaŇüan felaketten habersiz olan Sedat, bu sorunu da √ß√∂zd√ľńü√ľ i√ßin rahatlar.

Ancak hi√ßbir sńĪr sonsuza kadar gizli kalmaz. Fotońüraflar, Korońülu malikanesinde bomba etkisi yaratńĪr. Selen, Nalan ve ailesi g√∂rmeden, fotońüraflarńĪn basńĪlmasńĪnńĪ engellemeyi baŇüarabilecek midir?

G√ľlseren BudayńĪcńĪońülu‚Äônun aynńĪ isimli romanńĪndan uyarlanan, ger√ßek bir aŇük hikayesinin konu alńĪndńĪńüńĪ Camdaki KńĪz, baŇüarńĪlńĪ oyuncu kadrosuyla da g√∂z dolduruyor. Senaryosunu Seda AltaylńĪ Turgutlu‚Äônun kaleme aldńĪńüńĪ, y√∂netmenlińüini ise Nadim G√ľ√ß'√ľn √ľstlendińüi Camdaki KńĪz PerŇüembe 20.00'de Kanal D'de!

Camdaki KńĪz Trailer is streaming! Adapted from Gulseren Budayicioglu‚Äôs novel of the same name, Camdaki KńĪz is based on a true love story. Kanal D‚Äôs new drama has a phenomenal cast. Burcu Biricik is going to portray the character Nalan, and the other successful actors and actresses of the series are Devrim Yakut, Feri Baycu Guler, Feyyaz Serifoglu, Hamza Yazici, Hande Ataizi, Merve Polat, Nihal Menzil, Nur Surer, Selma Ergec, Serif Erol, Tamer Levent, Tugrul Tulek. –Ď—Ź–Ľ–į –ľ–Ķ—á–ļ–į

–°–ł–≥—É—Ä–Ĺ–ĺ –Ĺ–Ķ –∑–Ĺ–į–Ķ—ā–Ķ, –Ĺ–ĺ –Ī—Ź–Ľ–į—ā–į –ľ–Ķ—á–ļ–į –Ķ –Ķ–ī–ł–Ĺ—Ā—ā–≤–Ķ–Ĺ–ł—Ź—ā –Ņ—Ä–Ķ–ī—Ā—ā–į–≤–ł—ā–Ķ–Ľ –Ĺ–į —ā–ĺ–≤–į —Ā–Ķ–ľ–Ķ–Ļ—Ā—ā–≤–ĺ, –ļ–ĺ–Ļ—ā–ĺ –Ņ—Ä–ł–Ķ–ľ–į —Ö–ĺ—Ä–į—ā–į –ļ–į—ā–ĺ —Ö—Ä–į–Ĺ–į. –ó–į—ā–ĺ–≤–į –Ķ —Ā—ā—Ä–į–Ĺ–Ĺ–ĺ, —á–Ķ –Ņ—Ä–Ķ–∑ 2009-—ā–į, –≤ –Ď–Ķ—Ä–Ľ–ł–Ĺ—Ā–ļ–ł—Ź –∑–ĺ–ĺ–Ņ–į—Ä–ļ, –Ķ–ī–Ĺ–į –∂–Ķ–Ĺ–į —Ä–Ķ—ą–ł–Ľ–į –ī–ĺ–Ī—Ä–ĺ–≤–ĺ–Ľ–Ĺ–ĺ –ī–į —Ā–ļ–ĺ—á–ł –≤ –ļ–Ľ–Ķ—ā–ļ–į—ā–į –Ĺ–į —ā–Ķ–∑–ł –∑–≤–Ķ—Ä–ĺ–≤–Ķ. –ė —ā–ĺ —ā–ĺ—á–Ĺ–ĺ, –ļ–ĺ–≥–į—ā–ĺ –Ī–ł–Ľ —á–į—Ā—ä—ā –ł–ľ –∑–į —Ö—Ä–į–Ĺ–Ķ–Ĺ–Ķ. –Ė–Ķ–Ĺ–į—ā–į —Ā–Ķ –ĺ–∑–ĺ–≤–į–Ľ–į –≤ —Ä–ĺ–≤–į —Ā –≤–ĺ–ī–į –ł –∑–į–Ņ–ĺ—á–Ĺ–į–Ľ–į –ī–į –ľ–į—Ö–į —Ā —Ä—ä—Ü–Ķ –ł –ī–į –≤–ł–ļ–į ‚Äď –≥–ĺ–Ľ—Ź–ľ–į –≥—Ä–Ķ—ą–ļ–į, –∑–į—Č–ĺ—ā–ĺ —ā–ĺ–≤–į –Ņ—Ä–ł–≤–Ľ—Ź–ļ–Ľ–ĺ –≤–Ĺ–ł–ľ–į–Ĺ–ł–Ķ—ā–ĺ –Ĺ–į –ļ–ĺ—Ā–ľ–į—ā–ł—ā–Ķ –ĺ–Ī–ł—ā–į—ā–Ķ–Ľ–ł. –í–ł–ī–Ķ–ĺ—ā–ĺ, –ļ–ĺ–Ķ—ā–ĺ —Č–Ķ –≤–ł–ī–ł—ā–Ķ –≤ –Ĺ–į—ą–į—ā–į –į–Ļ–ī–Ķ –Ī–≥ –ļ–Ľ–į—Ā–į—Ü–ł—Ź –Ķ –∑–į—Ā–Ĺ–Ķ—ā–ĺ –ĺ—ā —ā—É—Ä–ł—Ā—ā –ł –Ņ–ĺ–ļ–į–∑–≤–į –į—ā–į–ļ–į—ā–į –Ĺ–į –Ī–Ķ–Ľ–ł—ā–Ķ –ľ–Ķ—á–ļ–ł. –ó–į —Č–į—Ā—ā–ł–Ķ –≤—Ā–ł—á–ļ–ĺ –∑–į–≤—ä—Ä—ą–ł–Ľ–ĺ –Ī–Ľ–į–≥–ĺ–Ņ–ĺ–Ľ—É—á–Ĺ–ĺ, –Ĺ–ĺ –ļ–į–ī—Ä–ł—ā–Ķ —Ā–į —Ā—ā—Ä–į—Ö–ĺ—ā–Ĺ–ł. –ď–Ľ–Ķ–ī–į–Ļ—ā–Ķ.

–Ę–ł–≥—ä—Ä

–ü—Ä–Ķ–∑ 2014, –≤ –ė–Ĺ–ī–ł—Ź, –Ķ–ī–ł–Ĺ –ľ—ä–∂, –ļ–ĺ–Ļ—ā–ĺ –Ī–ł–Ľ –Ņ—Ä–Ķ–ļ–į–Ľ–ł–Ľ —Ā –į–Ľ–ļ–ĺ—Ö–ĺ–Ľ–į, –≤–Ľ—Ź–∑—ä–Ľ –≤ –∑–ĺ–ĺ–Ņ–į—Ä–ļ–į –Ĺ–į –Ě—é –Ē–Ķ–Ľ—Ö–ł. –Ę–ĺ–Ļ –ī—Ä–į–∑–Ĺ–Ķ–Ľ –Ņ–ĺ—Ā–Ķ—ā–ł—ā–Ķ–Ľ–ł—ā–Ķ –ł –Ņ–Ķ—Ä—Ā–ĺ–Ĺ–į–Ľ–į –ł –≤ –Ķ–ī–ł–Ĺ –ľ–ĺ–ľ–Ķ–Ĺ—ā —Ā—ā–ł–≥–Ĺ–į–Ľ –ī–ĺ –ļ–Ľ–Ķ—ā–ļ–į—ā–į –Ĺ–į –Ī–Ķ–Ľ–ł—ā–Ķ —ā–ł–≥—Ä–ł. –Ę–ĺ–≤–į —Ā–į –Ķ–ī–Ĺ–ł –ĺ—ā –Ĺ–į–Ļ-–ĺ–Ņ–į—Ā–Ĺ–ł—ā–Ķ –∂–ł–≤–ĺ—ā–Ĺ–ł –ł –ī–į —Ā–Ķ –∑–į–ļ–į—á–į—ą —Ā —ā—Ź—Ö –Ĺ–Ķ –Ķ –Ĺ–ł–ļ–į–ļ —Ä–į–∑—É–ľ–Ĺ–ĺ. –Ě–ĺ —á–ĺ–≤–Ķ–ļ—ä—ā –Ĺ–Ķ –Ĺ–ĺ—Ā–Ķ–Ľ —Ā—ä–∑–Ĺ–į–Ĺ–ł–Ķ –ł —Ā–ļ–ĺ—á–ł–Ľ –Ņ—Ä–ł –∑–≤–Ķ—Ä–ĺ–≤–Ķ—ā–Ķ. –í –Ĺ–į—á–į–Ľ–ĺ—ā–ĺ –Ĺ—Ź–ľ–į–Ľ–ĺ –Ņ—Ä–ĺ–Ī–Ľ–Ķ–ľ–ł ‚Äď —ā–ł–≥—ä—Ä—ä—ā –Ī–ł–Ľ –Ņ—Ä–ĺ—Ā—ā–ĺ –Ľ—é–Ī–ĺ–Ņ–ł—ā–Ķ–Ĺ. –Ě–ĺ –ļ–ĺ–≥–į—ā–ĺ —ā—ä–Ľ–Ņ–į—ā–į –∑–į–Ņ–ĺ—á–Ĺ–į–Ľ–į –ī–į –≤–ł–ļ–į, –∂–ł–≤–ĺ—ā–Ĺ–ĺ—ā–ĺ —Ā–Ķ –ł–∑–Ĺ–Ķ—Ä–≤–ł–Ľ–ĺ. –Ę–ĺ–≤–į, –ļ–ĺ–Ķ—ā–ĺ –Ņ–ĺ—Ā–Ľ–Ķ–ī–≤–į–Ľ–ĺ —Č–Ķ –≤–ł–ī–ł—ā–Ķ –≤ –Ĺ–ĺ–≤–ĺ—ā–ĺ –Ĺ–ł –≤–ł–ī–Ķ–ĺ.

–°–Ľ–ĺ–Ĺ—Ā–ļ–ł –į—ā–į–ļ–ł

–Ě–į —Ä–Ķ–Ľ–ł–≥–ł–ĺ–∑–Ĺ–ł—ā–Ķ —Ą–Ķ—Ā—ā–ł–≤–į–Ľ–ł –≤ –ė–Ĺ–ī–ł—Ź —Ā–Ľ–ĺ–Ĺ–ĺ–≤–Ķ—ā–Ķ —Ā–į –∑–į–ī—ä–Ľ–∂–ł—ā–Ķ–Ľ–Ķ–Ĺ –Ķ–Ľ–Ķ–ľ–Ķ–Ĺ—ā. –Ę–Ķ —Ā–į —Ā—á–ł—ā–į–Ĺ–ł –∑–į —Ā–≤–Ķ—Č–Ķ–Ĺ–ł –∂–ł–≤–ĺ—ā–Ĺ–ł –ł —ā—Ź—Ö–Ĺ–ĺ—ā–ĺ –Ņ—Ä–ł—Ā—ä—Ā—ā–≤–ł–Ķ —Ā–Ķ —Ā–ľ—Ź—ā–į –∑–į –ī–ĺ–Ī—Ä–į –Ņ–ĺ–Ľ–ł—á–Ī–į. –Ě–ĺ –ļ–ĺ–≥–į—ā–ĺ —Ā—ä–Ī–Ķ—Ä–Ķ—ą –ī–ł–≤–ĺ –∂–ł–≤–ĺ—ā–Ĺ–ĺ —Ā –ļ—Ä—Ź—Ā–ļ–į—Č–į —ā—ä–Ľ–Ņ–į –Ņ–ĺ–Ĺ—Ź–ļ–ĺ–≥–į —Ā–Ķ —Ā–Ľ—É—á–≤–į—ā –Ĺ–Ķ–Ņ—Ä–ł—Ź—ā–Ĺ–ĺ—Ā—ā–ł. –Ě–Ķ —Ā–į –ľ–į–Ľ–ļ–ĺ —Ā–Ľ—É—á–į–ł—ā–Ķ, –≤ –ļ–ĺ–ł—ā–ĺ —Ā–Ľ–ĺ–Ĺ–ĺ–≤–Ķ—ā–Ķ –ĺ—ā–ļ–į—á–į—ā –ł —Ā–Ķ –≤—ā—É—Ä–≤–į—ā –ļ—ä–ľ –∑—Ä–ł—ā–Ķ–Ľ–ł—ā–Ķ. –ź –≤ Youtube –ł–ľ–į –ľ–Ĺ–ĺ–≥–ĺ —ā–į–ļ–ł–≤–į –≤–ł–ī–Ķ–į. –ü—Ä–ĺ—Ā—ā–ĺ –Ĺ–į–Ņ–ł—ą–Ķ—ā–Ķ Elephant attacks. –Ē–≤–Ķ –ĺ—ā —ā—Ź—Ö —Č–Ķ –≤–ł –Ņ–ĺ–ļ–į–∂–Ķ–ľ –≤ –Ĺ–į—ą–į—ā–į –ļ–Ľ–į—Ā–į—Ü–ł—Ź. –í–ł–∂—ā–Ķ –ł –Ĺ–į—É—á–Ķ—ā–Ķ –Ņ—Ä–ł—á–ł–Ĺ–ł—ā–Ķ –∑–į –Ņ–ĺ–≤–Ķ–ī–Ķ–Ĺ–ł–Ķ—ā–ĺ –Ĺ–į —ā–Ķ–∑–ł –∂–ł–≤–ĺ—ā–Ĺ–ł.

Sencer ile Tapar, kńĪlńĪk deńüiŇütirmiŇü ve Ňěelemzar‚Äôa girmeyi baŇüarmńĪŇütńĪ. SurlarńĪn i√ßinde operasyona devam edip Ňěelemzar‚ÄôńĪn kapńĪsńĪnńĪ MelikŇüah‚ÄôńĪn ordusuna a√ßmayńĪ baŇüarmńĪŇütńĪ. Zira babasńĪ Kavurd‚Äôun √∂l√ľm√ľn√ľ bu sńĪrra bańülamakta ve babasńĪnńĪn √∂l√ľm√ľnde baŇü failin Nizam√ľlm√ľlk olduńüunu d√ľŇü√ľnmekteydi. TuranŇüah, Nizam√ľlm√ľlk‚Äô√ľ MelikŇüah‚ÄôńĪn √∂n√ľne getirmiŇü ve Nizam√ľlm√ľlk‚Äô√ľ √∂ld√ľrmekle tehdit etmiŇüti. TuranŇüah, Nizam√ľlm√ľlk‚Äô√ľ √∂ld√ľrmeyi baŇüarabilecek midir? MelikŇüah‚Äôa a√ßńĪk√ßa meydan okuyan TuranŇüah, MelikŇüah‚ÄôńĪn gazabńĪndan kurtulabilecek midir?

Z√ľbeyde‚Äônin baŇühatunluk makamńĪndan alńĪnmamasńĪ √ľzerine haksńĪzlńĪńüa uńüradńĪńüńĪnńĪ d√ľŇü√ľnen ve bunu MelikŇüah‚Äôa a√ßńĪk a√ßńĪk dile getirmekten √ßekinmeyen Terken, Z√ľbeyde‚Äôye karŇüńĪ bir oyun kuracak mńĪdńĪr? snippet.title: BAO Disney Pixar Full Short Film Official Promos | Incredibles 2 Bonus (2018) Animation Adventure HD
snippet.description:
Follow US on Social Media!
‚Ėļ Instagram: https://instagram.com/aniboxtraileraccess/
‚Ėļ Twitter: https://twitter.com/AniBox_Access

Bao is a 2018 American computer-animated short film written and directed by Domee Shi and produced by Pixar Animation Studios. It was released with Incredibles 2 on June 15, 2018. The film is about an aging and lonely Chinese-Canadian mother, suffering from empty nest syndrome, who receives an unexpected second chance at motherhood when she makes a steamed bun (baozi) that comes to life. The film won the Oscar for the Best Animated Short Film at the 91st Academy Awards.

A Chinese-Canadian woman suffering from empty nest syndrome gets a second shot at motherhood when one of her handmade dumplings comes alive.

¬© 2018 The Walt Disney Company. | All Rights Reserved.

–ė–ľ–į –Ĺ—Ź–ļ–ĺ–Ľ–ļ–ĺ –Ĺ–į—á–ł–Ĺ–į –ī–į —Ā–Ķ —Ā–Ņ—Ä–į–≤–ł–ľ —Ā –į–≤—ā–ĺ–ļ—Ä–į–∂–Ī–ł—ā–Ķ. –°—ā–į–Ĺ–ī–į—Ä—ā–Ĺ–ł—ā–Ķ –≤–į—Ä–ł–į–Ĺ—ā–ł –≤–ļ–Ľ—é—á–≤–į—ā –į–Ľ–į—Ä–ľ–į, –∑–į—Ā—ā—Ä–į—Ö–ĺ–≤–ļ–į, –≥–į—Ä–į–∂, –≤–ł–ī–Ķ–ĺ–Ĺ–į–Ī–Ľ—é–ī–Ķ–Ĺ–ł–Ķ –ł —ā.–Ĺ. –Ě–ĺ –Ĺ–Ķ—Ā—ā–į–Ĺ–ī–į—Ä—ā–Ĺ–ł—ā–Ķ –≤–ļ–Ľ—é—á–≤–į—ā –ĺ–≥–Ĺ–Ķ—Ö–≤—ä—Ä–≥–į—á–ļ–į. –ģ–∂–Ĺ–į –ź—Ą—Ä–ł–ļ–į –Ķ —Ā—ā—Ä–į–Ĺ–į —Ā –ĺ–≥—Ä–ĺ–ľ–Ĺ–ł –Ņ—Ä–ĺ–Ī–Ľ–Ķ–ľ–ł –Ņ–ĺ –ĺ—ā–Ĺ–ĺ—ą–Ķ–Ĺ–ł–Ķ –Ĺ–į –į–≤—ā–ĺ–ļ—Ä–į–∂–Ī–ł—ā–Ķ. –í—Ā—Ź–ļ–į –≥–ĺ–ī–ł–Ĺ–į —ā–į–ľ –∑–į–ī–ł–≥–į—ā –Ņ–ĺ —Ā—Ä–Ķ–ī–Ĺ–ĺ 13 —Ö–ł–Ľ—Ź–ī–ł –ú–ü–°-—ā–į. –í—ä–Ņ—Ä–Ķ–ļ–ł –ĺ–Ņ–ł—ā–ł—ā–Ķ –Ĺ–į –ī—ä—Ä–∂–į–≤–į—ā–į –ī–į —Ā–Ķ —Ā–Ņ—Ä–į–≤–ł —Ā –Ņ—Ä–ĺ–Ī–Ľ–Ķ–ľ–į, –į–≤—ā–ĺ–ī–∂–į–ľ–Ī–į–∑–ł—ā–Ķ –Ņ—Ä–ĺ–ī—ä–Ľ–∂–ł–Ľ–ł –ī–į —Ā–ł –ī–Ķ–Ļ—Ā—ā–≤–į—ā —á–Ķ—Ā—ā–ĺ –ł –Ņ–ĺ—á—ā–ł –Ī–Ķ–∑–Ĺ–į–ļ–į–∑–į–Ĺ–ĺ. –ó–į—ā–ĺ–≤–į, –Ņ—Ä–į–≤–ł—ā–Ķ–Ľ—Ā—ā–≤–ĺ—ā–ĺ –Ņ—Ä–ł–Ķ–Ľ–ĺ –∑–į–ļ–ĺ–Ĺ, —Ā–Ņ–ĺ—Ä–Ķ–ī –ļ–ĺ–Ļ—ā–ĺ –į–ļ–ĺ —Ö–≤–į–Ĺ–Ķ—ą –Ĺ—Ź–ļ–ĺ–≥–ĺ –ī–į —Ā–Ķ –ĺ–Ņ–ł—ā–≤–į –ī–į –∑–į–ī–ł–≥–Ĺ–Ķ –ļ–ĺ–Ľ–į—ā–į —ā–ł ‚Äď —Ā–Ņ–ĺ–ļ–ĺ–Ļ–Ĺ–ĺ –ľ–ĺ–∂–Ķ—ą –ī–į –≥–ĺ —É–Ī–ł–Ķ—ą. –ė–Ľ–ł –Ņ–ĺ–Ĺ–Ķ –ī–į –ľ—É –Ĺ–į–Ĺ–Ķ—Ā–Ķ—ą –Ĺ–Ķ–Ņ–ĺ–Ņ—Ä–į–≤–ł–ľ–į —ā–Ķ–Ľ–Ķ—Ā–Ĺ–į –Ņ–ĺ–≤—Ä–Ķ–ī–į. –ė –ł–ľ–Ķ–Ĺ–Ĺ–ĺ –∑–į—Ä–į–ī–ł —ā–ĺ–≤–į –Ī–ł–Ľ–ĺ –ł–∑–ĺ–Ī—Ä–Ķ—ā–Ķ–Ĺ–ĺ —Ā—ä–ĺ—Ä—ä–∂–Ķ–Ĺ–ł–Ķ—ā–ĺ ‚ÄěBlaster‚ÄĚ. –Ę–ĺ –Ņ—Ä–Ķ–ī—Ā—ā–į–≤–Ľ—Ź–≤–į 2 –ĺ–≥–Ĺ–Ķ—Ö–≤—ä—Ä–≥–į—á–ļ–ł, –ļ–ĺ–ł—ā–ĺ —Ā–Ķ –ľ–ĺ–Ĺ—ā–ł—Ä–į—ā –ĺ—ā –ī–≤–Ķ—ā–Ķ —Ā—ā—Ä–į–Ĺ–ł –Ĺ–į –ļ–ĺ–Ľ–į—ā–į –ł –ļ–ĺ–ł—ā–ĺ –ľ–ĺ–≥–į—ā –ī–į –Ī—ä–Ľ–≤–į—ā –Ņ–Ľ–į–ľ—ä—Ü–ł –Ĺ–į —Ä–į–∑—Ā—ā–ĺ—Ź–Ĺ–ł–Ķ –ĺ—ā –Ņ–ĺ—á—ā–ł 20 –ľ–Ķ—ā—Ä–į. –°–Ņ–ĺ—Ä–Ķ–ī —Ā—ä–∑–ī–į—ā–Ķ–Ľ—Ź –Ĺ–į —É—Ā—ā—Ä–ĺ–Ļ—Ā—ā–≤–ĺ—ā–ĺ, —Ü–Ķ–Ľ—ā–į –Ĺ–į –Ď–Ľ–į—Ā—ā–Ķ—Ä –Ĺ–Ķ –Ķ –ī–į —É–Ī–ł–≤–į, –į —Ā–į–ľ–ĺ –ī–į –ĺ—Ā–Ľ–Ķ–Ņ–ł –ł–Ľ–ł –ĺ–Ī–Ķ–∑–ī–≤–ł–∂–ł –ļ—Ä–į–ī–Ķ—Ü–į. –Ē–į–Ľ–ł –į—Ą—Ä–ł–ļ–į–Ĺ—Ü–ł—ā–Ķ —Ā–į —Ā–Ķ –≤—ä–∑–Ņ–ĺ–Ľ–∑–≤–į–Ľ–ł –ĺ—ā –Ĺ–Ķ–≥–ĺ –ł –ļ–į–ļ–≤–ł —Ā–į –Ņ–ĺ—Ā–Ľ–Ķ–ī—Ā—ā–≤–ł—Ź—ā–į ‚Äď –≤–ł–∂—ā–Ķ –≤ –Ĺ–į—ą–į—ā–į –ź–Ļ–ī–Ķ –Ď–ď –ļ–Ľ–į—Ā–į—Ü–ł—Ź.

–Ė–Ķ–Ĺ–Ķ–Ĺ–ł –≤ —Ö–ĺ—ā–Ķ–Ľ

–°–Ķ–≥–į —Č–Ķ –≤–ł –∑–į–Ņ–ĺ–∑–Ĺ–į–Ķ–ľ —Ā –Ķ–ī–ł–Ĺ –ł–∑–ļ–Ľ—é—á–ł—ā–Ķ–Ľ–Ĺ–ĺ —Ā—ā—Ä–į–Ĺ–Ķ–Ĺ –∑–į–ļ–ĺ–Ĺ. –Ę–ĺ–Ļ –≤–į–∂–ł –≤ –ź–ľ–Ķ—Ä–ł–ļ–į–Ĺ—Ā–ļ–ł—Ź —Č–į—ā –°–Ķ–≤–Ķ—Ä–Ĺ–į –ö–į—Ä–ĺ–Ľ–ł–Ĺ–į –ł –Ķ —Ā–Ľ–Ķ–ī–Ĺ–ł—Ź—ā. –ü—Ä–Ķ–ī—Ā—ā–į–≤–Ķ—ā–Ķ —Ā–ł, —á–Ķ –ī–≤–į–ľ–į—ā–į —Ā –ė–≤–į–Ļ–Ľ–ĺ —Ä–Ķ—ą–ł–ľ –ī–į –Ņ—Ä–Ķ—Ā–Ņ–ł–ľ –≤ –Ĺ—Ź–ļ–ĺ–Ļ –°–Ķ–≤–Ķ—Ä–Ĺ–ĺ-–ļ–į—Ä–ĺ–Ľ–ł–Ĺ—Ā–ļ–ł —Ö–ĺ—ā–Ķ–Ľ. –Ē–≤–į–ľ–į—ā–į, –ļ–į–ļ—ā–ĺ –∑–Ĺ–į–Ķ—ā–Ķ, –Ĺ–Ķ —Ā–ľ–Ķ –∂–Ķ–Ĺ–Ķ–Ĺ–ł, –Ĺ–ĺ —Ä–Ķ—ą–į–≤–į–ľ–Ķ –ī–į —Ā–Ķ —Ä–Ķ–≥–ł—Ā—ā—Ä–ł—Ä–į–ľ–Ķ –Ĺ–į —Ä–Ķ—Ü–Ķ–Ņ—Ü–ł—Ź—ā–į –ļ–į—ā–ĺ —Ā—ä–Ņ—Ä—É–≥ –ł —Ā—ä–Ņ—Ä—É–≥–į. –ē, —Ā–Ņ–ĺ—Ä–Ķ–ī –∑–į–ļ–ĺ–Ĺ–į –≤ —Č–į—ā–į, –ĺ—ā —ā–ĺ–∑–ł –ľ–ĺ–ľ–Ķ–Ĺ—ā –Ĺ–į—ā–į—ā—ä–ļ –ĺ—Ą–ł—Ü–ł–į–Ľ–Ĺ–ĺ –≤–Ķ—á–Ķ —Ā–ľ–Ķ –ľ—ä–∂ –ł –∂–Ķ–Ĺ–į —Ā—ä—Ā –∑–į–ļ–ĺ–Ĺ–Ķ–Ĺ –Ī—Ä–į–ļ. –Ě–Ķ—Č–ĺ –Ņ–ĺ–≤–Ķ—á–Ķ ‚Äď –∑–į–Ī—Ä–į–Ĺ–Ķ–Ĺ–ĺ –Ķ –Ĺ–į –ī–≤–ĺ–Ļ–ļ–į –ī–į —Ā–Ņ–ł –≤ –Ķ–ī–Ĺ–į –ł —Ā—ä—Č–į —Ā—ā–į—Ź, –į–ļ–ĺ –ī–≤–į–ľ–į—ā–į –Ĺ–Ķ —Ā–į –∂–Ķ–Ĺ–Ķ–Ĺ–ł. –ó–į—Č–ĺ –∑–į–ļ–ĺ–Ĺ–ł—ā–Ķ —Ā–į —ā–į–ļ–ł–≤–į –ł —Ā–Ņ–į–∑–≤–į—ā –Ľ–ł —Ā–Ķ –Ĺ–į–ł—Ā—ā–ł–Ĺ–į ‚Äď —Č–Ķ —Ä–į–∑–Ī–Ķ—Ä–Ķ—ā–Ķ –≤ –Ĺ–ĺ–≤–ĺ—ā–ĺ –Ĺ–ł –≤–ł–ī–Ķ–ĺ.

Ender‚Äôin ve YńĪldńĪz‚ÄôńĪn ortadan kaybolmasńĪyla meydan tamamen Ňěahika‚Äôya kalmńĪŇütńĪr. Ňěahika gelecekle ilgili planlarńĪnńĪ ilmek ilmek dokurken, Halit‚Äôi ve √ßocuklarńĪnńĪ avucunun i√ßine almńĪŇü, Halit‚Äôle evlilik hazńĪrlńĪklarńĪ i√ßindedir. YńĪldńĪz hamiledir ve bebeńüine bir zarar gelmemesi i√ßin hamilelik d√∂nemini herkesten uzakta bir k√∂yde ge√ßirmektedir. Bebeńüini sańülńĪkla d√ľnyaya getirmek ve b√ľt√ľn k√∂t√ľl√ľklerden uzak durmak tek amacńĪdńĪr. YńĪldńĪz‚ÄôńĪn aldńĪńüńĪ radikal karar, bir gece kapńĪsńĪnńĪn √ßalmasńĪyla deńüiŇüir. snippet.title: Film Theory: The Minions in Minions AREN'T MINIONS!
snippet.description:
Subscribe to NEVER miss a Film Theory! ‚Ėļ http://bit.ly/1dI8VBH¬† ¬†¬†

What IS a Minion? That was the question I started with when working on this theory. I wanted to REALLY understand these little guys, so I started searching the movies for information. Well Theorists, I found more that I expected buried in the Minions¬†and Despicable Me movies. A LOT more. So much that I can definitely¬†say that the Minions in the movies are NOT Minions. You'll have to watch to find out WHY!

snippet.title: EXPERIMENT : Big Pink Eruption Volcano Toothpaste From Coca-cola ,Sprite ,Fanta , Mirinda and MENTOS
snippet.description:
Hello friends, as you asked, again a big experiment. A very large volcano with sand to which the reaction of different soda  (cola, fanta, mirindas, etc.) and menthos was made. The eruption turned out to be very interesting!)

If you want more scale experiments - write in the comments and like the video!)

Please like and share this video!)

This channel is scientific and educational and we are professionals in our field with special education.never repeat this!

snippet.description:
Camdaki KńĪz 1. B√∂l√ľm 

8 Nisan PerŇüembe

T√ľrkiye'nin en b√ľy√ľk oteller zinciri olan Korońülu'nun Ňüirketinde mimar olarak √ßalńĪŇüan Nalan, yumuŇüak huylu, zeki, sńĪcakkanlńĪ ve d√ľnyalar g√ľzeli bir gen√ß kadńĪndńĪr. Ailesinin tek √ßocuńüudur. HayatńĪnńĪ varlńĪk, ilgi, alaka i√ßinde ge√ßirmiŇü, en iyi okullardan dereceyle mezun olmuŇü olan Nalan'ńĪn, herkesten sakladńĪńüńĪ bir sńĪrrńĪ vardńĪr...

Dińüer yandan Nalan'ńĪn √ßalńĪŇütńĪńüńĪ Ňüirketin gen√ß veliahtńĪ Sedat, kendisinden yaŇü√ßa b√ľy√ľk ve evli bir kadńĪn olan, sosyetik g√ľzel Cana ile uzun yńĪllardńĪr yasak bir iliŇüki yaŇüamaktadńĪr. Ňěirketin sahibi ve Sedat'ńĪn babasńĪ olan Rafet Korońülu, yńĪllarca didinip kurduńüu Korońülu imparatorluńüunun itibarńĪnńĪn, ŇüńĪmarńĪk ońülu Sedat tarafńĪndan lekelenmesine izin vermeyecektir. Rafet, Sedat'ńĪ Cana'dan ayńĪrmak i√ßin, onu zorla baŇüka biriyle evlendirmeye karar verir.

Ve kader √ßarkńĪ d√∂ner... Sedat ile Nalan'ńĪn yollarńĪ kesiŇüir. HayatńĪ boyunca kendisini babasńĪna ispatlayamamńĪŇü olan Sedat'ńĪn tek √ßaresi, daha √∂nce hi√ß tanńĪmadńĪńüńĪ Nalan'la evlenmektir. Peki Sedat, Nalan'ńĪn hayallerindeki "kurtarńĪcńĪ prens" midir? 

√áocukluklarńĪndan yaralńĪ olan bu ikili kavuŇüup masallardaki gibi bir aŇük yaŇüayabilecek midir? Yoksa onlarńĪ bug√ľne kadar hi√ß hayal etmedikleri bir karanlńĪk mńĪ beklemektedir?

G√ľlseren BudayńĪcńĪońülu‚Äônun aynńĪ isimli romanńĪndan uyarlanan, ger√ßek bir aŇük hikayesinin konu alńĪndńĪńüńĪ Camdaki KńĪz, baŇüarńĪlńĪ oyuncu kadrosuyla da g√∂z dolduruyor. Nalan karakterini Burcu Biricik‚Äôin canlandńĪrdńĪńüńĪ Camdaki KńĪz‚Äôda; Devrim Yakut, Feri Baycu G√ľler, Feyyaz Ňěerifońülu, Hamza YazńĪcńĪ, Hande Ataizi, Merve Polat, Nihal Menzil, Nur S√ľrer, Selma Erge√ß,  Ňěerif Erol, Tamer Levent, Tuńürul T√ľlek yer alńĪyor. Senaryosunu Seda AltaylńĪ Turgutlu‚Äônun kaleme aldńĪńüńĪ, y√∂netmenlińüini ise Nadim G√ľ√ß'√ľn √ľstlendińüi Camdaki KńĪz PerŇüembe 20.00'de Kanal D'de!

------------------

Camdaki KńĪz Trailer is streaming! Adapted from Gulseren Budayicioglu‚Äôs novel of the same name, Camdaki KńĪz is based on a true love story. Kanal D‚Äôs new drama has a phenomenal cast. Burcu Biricik is going to portray the character Nalan, and the other successful actors and actresses of the series are Devrim Yakut, Feri Baycu Guler, Feyyaz Serifoglu, Hamza Yazici, Hande Ataizi, Merve Polat, Nihal Menzil, Nur Surer, Selma Ergec, Serif Erol, Tamer Levent, Tugrul Tulek. Written by Seda Altayli Turgutlu, directed by Nadim Guc, Camdaki Kiz is going to premier on 8 April Thursday at 8 pm on Kanal D!

Amma ve lakin, Kuzey, √ľniversite okumak i√ßin ńįstanbul‚Äôa gittińüinde t√ľm s√∂zlerini unutur, yeni aŇüklara yelken a√ßar.

Kuzey, aŇüńĪk olduńüu kadńĪnla evlenmiŇü, √ľ√ß √ßocuk sahibi olmuŇütur ama YńĪldńĪz‚Äôa yaŇüattńĪńüńĪnńĪ tam yirmi sene sonra yaŇüamńĪŇü, terk edilmiŇü; √ľstelik dolandńĪrńĪlńĪp sńĪfńĪr noktasńĪna gelmiŇütir. Kuzey, yńĪllar √∂nce binbir umutla geldińüi ve hayallerini, en g√ľzel g√ľnlerini yaŇüadńĪńüńĪ Ňüehri, √ľ√ß kńĪzńĪyla birlikte terk edip memleketine d√∂nmeye karar verir.

snippet.title: Crew-2 Mission | Approach and Docking
snippet.description:
On Friday, April 23 at 5:49 a.m. EDT, 9:49 UTC, SpaceX and NASA launched Dragon‚Äôs second six-month operational crew mission (Crew-2) to the International Space Station (ISS) from historic Launch Complex 39A (LC-39A) at NASA‚Äôs Kennedy Space Center in Florida. Following stage separation, Falcon 9‚Äôs first stage landed on the ‚ÄúOf Course I Still Love You‚ÄĚ droneship, stationed in the Atlantic Ocean. 

Crew-2 is currently in orbit and is expected to autonomously dock with the International Space Station on Saturday, April 24, at approximately 5:10 a.m. EDT, 9:10 UTC.

Osman Bey confronts the Byzantine-Mongolian army with the support of Malhun Hatun. SavcńĪ Bey is stabbed by Kalonoz in the war, which witness the war for survival of Turkish tribes.

snippet.title: Crew-2 Mission | Launch
snippet.description:
SpaceX and NASA are targeting Friday, April 23 for Falcon 9‚Äôs launch of Dragon‚Äôs second six-month operational crew mission (Crew-2) to the International Space Station (ISS) from historic Launch Complex 39A (LC-39A) at NASA‚Äôs Kennedy Space Center in Florida. The instantaneous launch window opens at 5:49 a.m. EDT, 9:49 UTC, with a backup opportunity available on Monday, April 26 at 4:38 a.m. EDT, 8:38 UTC. 

Following stage separation, Falcon 9‚Äôs first stage will land on the ‚ÄúOf Course I Still Love You‚ÄĚ droneship, which will be stationed in the Atlantic Ocean. On Saturday, April 24, at approximately 5:10 a.m. EDT, 9:10 UTC, Dragon is expected to autonomously dock with the International Space Station.

This is the first human spaceflight mission to fly astronauts on a flight-proven Falcon 9 and Dragon. The Falcon 9 first stage supporting this mission previously launched the Crew-1 mission in November 2020 and the Dragon spacecraft previously flew Robert Behnken and Douglas Hurley to and from the International Space Station during SpaceX‚Äôs Demo-2 mission in 2020. 

The webcast will go live approximately 4 hours ahead of launch.

snippet.description:

snippet.title: Audi RS6 generations DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click¬†https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow¬†and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

Check this out, RS6 fans - we‚Äôve brought in every generation of the RS6 and they're going head-to-head in an almighty drag race! From the 450hp C5 through to the current 600hp C8, we‚Äôre here to find out just how these four generations of RS6 perform over the quarter-mile. 

As you‚Äôd expect, Mat‚Äôs in his long term RS6, the C8. With a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 under the bonnet, it can produce 600hp & 800Nm of torque. Alongside him, we‚Äôve got Yianni in the C7. It may be powered by the same size engine as the C8, however, it can produce slightly more power (605hp), although it‚Äôs also slightly down on torque (750Nm). 

The C6 may be several years older, but when you consider it‚Äôs powered by a 5-litre twin-turbo V10, it‚Äôs surely got to be in with a shout, right? Or perhaps the C5, with its 4.2-litre twin-turbo V8, could spring a surprise? 

All we know is, there‚Äôs only one way to find out‚Ä¶ LET‚ÄôS RACE!

snippet.title: Prince Philip's funeral: the key moments
snippet.description:
The funeral of the Duke of Edinburgh has taken place at St George's Chapel in Windsor.

The Queen led her family in mourning her husband of 73 years.

The service was led by the Dean of Windsor, who paid tribute to Prince Philip's "kindness, humour and humanity" - as well as his "unwavering loyalty" to Her Majesty.

Sky's Jason Farrell looks at how the funeral unfolded.

48. B√∂l√ľm √Ėzet:

Hamile olduńüunu √∂ńürenen Mavi kendini b√ľy√ľk bir ikilemin i√ßinde bulur. Ge√ßmiŇü acńĪlarńĪ ve korkularńĪ onun geleceńüe ve yeni bir bebeńüe tutunmasńĪna izin vermez. Dińüer yandan d√ľńü√ľn sonrasńĪ Halise y√ľz√ľnden konakta kopan fńĪrtńĪna, Sancar‚ÄôńĪn atacańüńĪ adńĪmla konańüńĪn b√ľt√ľn d√ľzeninin deńüiŇümesine neden olacaktńĪr.

Mavi ona karŇüńĪ hazńĪrlanan bu tuzaktan habersiz kendi kararsńĪzlńĪk cehenneminde yanmaktadńĪr. Bu konuda Sancar‚Äôla y√ľzleŇümenin hi√ß de kolay olmayacańüńĪnńĪn farkńĪndadńĪr ama asńĪl Melek karŇüńĪsńĪnda kendini √ßaresiz hissedecektir. Sancar ise sevdiklerini korumak i√ßin m√ľcadele ederken, √∂nce marinayla ilgili √∂ńürendińüi ger√ßeklerle sonra da annesinden alacańüńĪ bir haberle adeta yńĪkńĪlńĪr.

Yahya ise Elvan i√ßin √ßabalamaya devam eder ve ondan beklenmeyecek giriŇüimlerde bulunur. AnsńĪzńĪn gelen acńĪ bir haberle ikisinin de d√ľnyasńĪ deńüiŇümek √ľzeredir.

Halise √ßabalarńĪnńĪn sonu√ß vermedińüini g√∂rerek soluńüu Sedat ve G√ľven‚Äôin yanńĪnda alńĪr. Mavi ise Sancar ve Melek‚Äôle olan iliŇükisini temelinden etkileyecek bir karar vererek kendini klinińüin kapńĪsńĪ √∂n√ľnde bulacaktńĪr.
